name: Veeva Systems
confidenceReason: Dominant life sciences cloud at 16% growth on $3.2B scale. >99% retention. But core CRM saturation and platform migration risk.
bullCase: The dominant cloud software provider for life sciences. 16% top-line growth at a $3.2B scale proves the industry is highly resistant to macro spending cuts. Strict FDA compliance needs make Veeva virtually irremovable.
bearCase: Growth is decelerating as they saturate their core commercial CRM market, and platform migration introduces execution risk.

cagrModel.basis: Normalized vertical SaaS multiple; accounts for CRM saturation and platform migration risk.

description: Veeva Systems Inc. provides cloud-based software for the life sciences industry in North America, Europe, the Asia Pacific, the Middle East, Africa, and Latin America.
